scenarios.name: 遮擋
scenarios.description: Target vehicle is briefly blocked by foreground objects or other cars.

scenarios.name: 車交會
scenarios.description: Multiple visually similar vehicles pass or overlap near the selected target.

scenarios.name: 快速橫移
scenarios.description: Selected vehicle moves quickly across the frame and stresses latency compensation.

scenarios.name: 出畫面再進來
scenarios.description: Selected vehicle leaves the frame and later re-enters from a plausible corridor.
